text: The environment around me feels pristine and modern, humming quietly with the intention of creativity and innovation. Standing in a space dedicated to research and development, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The bright lights and angled surfaces awaken a focus in me—a desire to engage more deeply with the questions of how humanity and technology intermingle. I am both observer and participant here, swept by an undercurrent of excitement for what might be discovered in such a thoughtfully designed place.
